channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ramaphosa's legal battle over impeachment inquiry and Phala Phala scandal
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's legal team has argued that proceeding with the impeachment inquiry committee's proceedings could cause irreparable harm to his reputation and public standing. Adv Wim Treng...

item.title: MainPower Advises Residents on Electrical Safety During Rainy Season
item.description: MainPower Electricity Distribution Ltd has issued urgent safety guidelines for Enugu residents to avoid electrical hazards during the rainy season. The company's Head of Communications, Emeka Ezeh, wa...

item.title: Senate Judiciary Committee Questions FBI Director Kash Patel's Conduct Amid Allegations of Misconduct
item.description: Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (D-RI) confronted Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche during a Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, questioning the integrity of FBI Director Kash Patel. Whitehouse raised c...

item.title: PTI to hold nationwide rallies on August 5 as party marks Imran Khan's arrest anniversary
item.description: Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) has announced that it will organise nationwide rallies on August 5 to mark the anniversary of the arrest of party founder and former prime minister Imran Khan. The decis...

item.title: Ontario Minister Stan Cho Billed Taxpayers Over $16,000 for Toronto Hotel Stays
item.description: Ontario Tourism Minister Stan Cho has faced criticism after public disclosure records revealed he billed taxpayers over $16,000 for hotel stays in Toronto between 2025 and 2026. His riding of Willowda...

item.title: Todd Blanche's Confirmation Hearing Highlights Ethical Concerns Over Ties to Trump
item.description: U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced intense scrutiny during his Senate Judiciary Committee confirmation hearing. Senator John Kennedy (R-LA) posed a direc...

item.title: Kenyans to Choose Opposition Candidate to Challenge Ruto in 2027
item.description: The Wantam Movement has launched an online voting platform allowing Kenyans to select their preferred opposition presidential candidate to challenge President William Ruto in the 2027 General Election...

item.title: Nigerian Woman Delivers Quadruplets at 50 After Late Marriage
item.description: Olushola Olonade, a Nigerian woman in her late 40s, recently gave birth to four children—two boys and two girls—at the age of 50. She married at 48 after decades of waiting for a husband, marking a si...

item.title: Air India crash investigation concludes after final stages of cockpit and psychological reviews
item.description: The Indian Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau (AAIB) has advanced to the final stages of its probe into the 2025 Air India crash that killed 260 people. Investigators have compiled a cockpit voice...

item.title: Toronto man hospitalized with non-life-threatening gunshot wound after being left at emergency room
item.description: A man was reportedly abandoned at a Toronto hospital with a gunshot wound, according to police. The incident occurred around 3:15 a.m. on Wednesday when the individual was left at an unspecified locat...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Reveals Suliman Carrim's Absence Amid Testimony Concerns
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry has faced conflicting claims regarding Suliman Carrim's attendance. Carrim, a North West businessman, submitted a sick note to excuse his appearance but was allegedl...

item.title: Arrest of man threatening Nigel Farage follows death of Ann Widdecombe in targeted attack
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have arrested a man for threatening to shoot Nigel Farage, following the recent death of former MP Ann Widdecombe in a 'targeted attack'. The suspect, identified as a British A...

item.title: Thai Pub Fire Claims 32 Lives as Investigations Begin
item.description: A deadly fire at a Bangkok live music pub has claimed 32 lives, with dozens more still hospitalized, according to officials. The incident occurred late Sunday night at the Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao pub i...

item.title: Burglary attempt at Lamine Yamal’s home following Spain’s World Cup win
item.description: Lamine Yamal, the young Spanish footballer, faced an attempted burglary at his Barcelona home shortly after Spain’s 2-0 victory over France in the 2026 World Cup semi-final. Police confirmed the incid...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment: Prosecution Drops 6 Witnesses in Threat Case
item.description: The impeachment prosecution of Vice President Sara Duterte has decided to drop six witnesses related to the alleged threat against President Ferdinand Marcos, Jr., First Lady Liza Marcos, and ex-Speak...

item.title: Tanzania's Local Dairy Industry Expands Amid Reduced Reliance on Imports
item.description: The Tanzanian dairy sector is experiencing growth as local producers expand operations, supported by government reforms and modern technology. Milk production has surged by 40% over six years, reachin...

item.title: Joshua Vides Transforms Cars and Gallery into Flat Sketch Art
item.description: Joshua Vides' groundbreaking art project, 'Flat Out: The Art of Joshua Vides,' showcases his unique technique of hand-painting real cars and a gallery space to resemble flat black-and-white drawings. ...

item.title: Maine Democrats Navigate Leadership Transition Amid Internal Divisions
item.description: The article discusses the internal fractures within Maine's Democratic Party as they seek to replace outgoing chairperson Michael Platner. Following Platner's resignation amid allegations of mismanage...

item.title: Fire at Bara Taxi Rank Causes Damage to Three Shops, No Injuries Reported
item.description: A fire broke out at a taxi rank in Bara, Soweto, on Wednesday morning, damaging three shops. Property owner Sydney Morake confirmed the blaze started inside a supermarket that also sells and repairs e...

item.title: WestJet flight attendants face potential strike after failed negotiations
item.description: WestJet flight attendants are set to vote on a potential strike that could ground the airline's operations on August 2, 2026, if unresolved labor disputes persist. Over 4,400 unionized workers represe...
